system.description: Heavy gunners wield heavy fully automatic weapons, acting as key support for a squad either covering their retreat or pressing their advance, often against superior numbers.

benefit.description: When using Sweeping Fire only one die (the higher) is reduced, not both. When using Suppressing Fire, you add a Penalty Die every two rounds, not each round.
benefit.name: Steady Spray

finalSecret.description: When you use Concentrated Fire with a bipod or tripod, you also roll a Bonus Die on the damage roll. When you spend a Fortune to avoid a ranged attack, you do not suffer a Close Call. When you are laying Suppressing Fire, spending a Fortune Point does not break your fire. Damage can, but you may make a Might +Career Test with a difficulty equal to half the damage to continue firing instead.
finalSecret.name: Relentless

system.weaponry: Heavy blaster carbine, light machine gun
